title: Preply shows how AI lesson summaries can support human tutoring
friendlyTitle: Preply uses AI to turn lessons into personalised feedback
summary: OpenAI published a case study on Preply’s Lesson Insights feature, which uses lesson transcripts to generate summaries, grammar corrections, vocabulary notes, pronunciation feedback, and follow-up exercises. Preply says 75% of English-language learners and more than 70% of tutors use the feature.
friendlySummary: Preply’s Lesson Insights feature analyses language lessons and creates summaries, corrections, vocabulary notes, pronunciation feedback, and practice exercises.
whyItMatters: Education is a strong daily-life use case when AI strengthens, rather than replaces, the human relationship. Automated feedback can give learners clearer next steps while freeing tutors from repetitive preparation and note-writing.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This is a practical example of AI helping learning. Students get clearer feedback, while tutors spend less time on admin and more time teaching.
